title: ACME PQC Agility Profile
description: ACME profile extension for per-account/per-order PQC posture negotiation. IETF Internet-Draft draft-vicente-acme-pqc-agility-profile. Author: Brian Vicente, Sanctum SecOps LLC. Patent-pending under USPTO Apps 64/080,137 and 19/698,870.
notes: Patent-pending under U.S. Provisional Patent Application No. 64/080,137 (Mechanism I) and U.S. Patent Application No. 19/698,870 (Mechanism II). See README and IPR Considerations note in the draft for full scope.
